source_jobs.title: Support Specialist - Dutch speaking
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Tebi is creating the first Connected Restaurant Management System that makes hospitality flow. In one seamless platform, Tebi embeds sales, reservations, kitchen prep, payments, and all the data that powers it, creating smooth service and intuitive insights.

Founded by Arnout Schuijff, co-founder of Adyen, and backed by €50 million in funding from Index Ventures & CapitalG, Tebi is built in-service of hospitality first. Thousands of restaurants, cafés, bars, and coffee shops across the Netherlands, UK, Italy, Spain, Germany, Denmark and Finland already love running on Tebi.



About the Role

You'll be the first person a merchant contacts when something's not working. This role sits at the center of Tebi's promise to hospitality: when a restaurant reaches out, you turn a stressful moment into a solved one. You'll own the resolution end-to-end, from first reply to final fix, and your fingerprints will be on every process we build to scale support without losing the personal touch.

Your day-to-day will be full of merchant communication, investigation and problem solving as well as project work around knowledge base, new tools, AI automation and product updates.



What You'll Do

 - Own the first response for every Tebi merchant who reaches out, across chat, email, and phone

 - Diagnose issues fast, using product knowledge and sharp instincts to identify the real problem

 - Work closely with Engineering, Product, and Ops to resolve complex problems

 - Hit and beat CSAT, QA, and speed targets in a high-pace environment

 - Turn what you learn from merchants into documentation, product feedback, and proactive education materials

 - Use and set up tools and AI-powered workflows to improve the way you do your work and expand it to company processes
   

What You'll Bring

 - You are a creative problem solver who enjoys interacting with hospitality businesses

 - You are empathetic towards our merchants and curious about their business

 - Clear, warm communicator who can hold a merchant's confidence through chat, email, and phone

 - Curious about the product, want to be an expert in Tebi system and can apply your knowledge

 - Persistence — you don't let a ticket die in someone else's inbox

 - Comfortable with scheduled on-call time

 - Fluent in Dutch and English (Italian, Spanish, Danish, German or Finnish are a plus)


If this speaks to you we can be the right fit. Learn more about how we work from our Recipe here: https://www.tebi.com/gb/careers.



Benefits:

 - Start-up Equity

 - Competitive Salary

 - Flexible time off

 - Lunch in the office

 - Team events
   
   

What is Restaurant Software?

Restaurants and other merchants use various software systems such as Point of Sale (POS), Reservations, Kitchen Display Systems (KDS), Payments, Inventory, Staffing, and the list goes on. These systems all need to speak to each other which they frequently don’t. It’s a mess, and we are fixing it.

From buying a croissant at a cafe to having dinner with friends, it’s a €4 Trillion+ global market and a critical part of everyday life in today's economy.



How we use AI at Tebi

We use AI the way our merchants use Tebi, to cut out the friction and get to what matters faster. We believe in a world where AI increases quality, efficiency and speed.

At Tebi, AI isn't a policy or a checkbox, it's just part of how we work. It helps us write, analyse, build, and improve but doesn’t make the last call. If there's a smarter way to do something, we want to find it.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Hamburg
source_jobs.description:
About Us

Tebi is creating the first Connected Restaurant Management System that makes hospitality flow. In one seamless platform, Tebi embeds sales, reservations, kitchen prep, payments, and all the data that powers it, creating smooth service and intuitive insights.

Founded by Arnout Schuijff, co-founder of Adyen, and backed by €50 million in funding from Index Ventures & CapitalG, Tebi is built in service of hospitality first. Thousands of restaurants, cafés, bars, and coffee shops across the Netherlands, UK, Italy, Spain, Germany, Denmark and Finland already love running on Tebi.



About the Role

We're looking for our first hospitality fan Sales person in NRW. Sales is at the heart of our business growth right now, and you will be driving it forward in your day-to-day. This role is about more than closing deals, it is about blending with the hospitality scene and winning the market.

In your day-to-day you can expect a mix of top of funnel activities, field sales, cold sales, networking, events and more.



What You’ll Do

Our sales are not your typical SaaS or office sales. We meet our customers where they operate:

 - Find the coolest new hospitality spots in town that everyone talks about

 - Create engaging ways to show our product

 - Use creative communication strategies to close the deal that will help the merchant operate smarter

 - Do a smooth handover to the onboarding team to make sure we go live quickly and successfully

 - Efficiently use our CRM and other Sales tools (Hubspot, Clay, AI) to leave more time for creativity and connection

 - Continuously improve and revisit our sales funnel

 - Keep an eye on the new developments in the industry and the merchants’ needs to create our own path
   

What You’ll Need

You are a natural relationship builder with a passion for hospitality industry:

 - Hands-on approach, independence and hunger for fast-paced operations

 - Natural curiosity and a healthy appetite for calculated risk - we want you to try new things and not be afraid to fail

 - Strong and engaging communication skills - you can grab an attention of a busy hospitality owner and keep them interested

 - Passion and curiosity for hospitality and hospitality tech

 - A minimum of 3 years of experience in Sales, Commercial Account Management or Hospitality

 - You are comfortable working in both English and German

If this speaks to you we can be the right fit. Learn more about how we work from our Recipe here: https://www.tebi.com/gb/careers.



Benefits:

 - Start-up Equity

 - Competitive Salary

 - Flexible time off

 - Team events
   

What is Restaurant Software?

Restaurants and other merchants use various software systems such as Point of Sale (POS), Reservations, Kitchen Display Systems (KDS), Payments, Inventory, Staffing, and the list goes on. These systems all need to speak to each other which they frequently don’t. It’s a mess, and we are fixing it.

From buying a croissant at a cafe to having dinner with friends, it’s a €4 Trillion+ global market and a critical part of everyday life in today's economy.



How we use AI at Tebi

We use AI the way our merchants use Tebi, to cut out the friction and get to what matters faster. We believe in a world where AI increases quality, efficiency and speed.

At Tebi, AI isn't a policy or a checkbox, it's just part of how we work. It helps us write, analyse, build, and improve but doesn’t make the last call. If there's a smarter way to do something, we want to find it.

source_jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Mobile Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

Tebi is creating the first Connected Restaurant Management System that makes hospitality flow. In one seamless platform, Tebi embeds sales, reservations, kitchen prep, payments, and all the data that powers it, creating smooth service and intuitive insights.

Founded by Arnout Schuijff, co-founder of Adyen, and backed by €50 million in funding from Index Ventures & CapitalG, Tebi is built in service of hospitality first. Thousands of restaurants, cafés, bars, and coffee shops across the Netherlands, UK, Italy, Spain, Germany, Denmark and Finland already love running on Tebi.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

We’re looking for a seasoned Fullstack Mobile Engineer to help shape the core experience for thousands of restaurant teams.You’ll lead development of cross-platform features, collaborate closely with design and product, and contribute to shared backend components when needed. You should bring a strong product mindset, care deeply about developer experience, and be excited about building better software, faster.

This role is ideal for someone who has experience shipping real-world apps, and is looking to make high-impact technical decisions in a fast-moving team.

For candidates who hold EU citizenship and moving from abroad, we offer a relocation package to make your transition to the Netherlands as smooth as possible.

Our Tech Stack: We use Kotlin multiplatform and Jetpack Compose. Everything runs in GCP and our database it’s Postgres.




WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 - Work on the development of our app architecture across Android and iOS

 - Design and implement shared business logic and client code, as well as platform-specific UI components where needed

 - Work closely with designers, PMs, and other engineers to deliver intuitive, delightful product experiences

 - Contribute to backend services where necessary, ensuring tight integration and performance across the stack

 - Continuously improve build tooling, developer experience, and code quality

 - Play a critical role in shaping how Tebi scales across new markets, languages, and user types




WHAT YOU BRING:

 - 7+ years of experience in software engineering, with deep expertise in mobile engineering

 - Strong experience building and shipping Android apps; familiarity with iOS and multiplatform development patterns

 - Strong experience with Kotlin

 - Comfortable owning architecture decisions and collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship features

 - A strong product mindset, you care about solving real problems for users, not just writing code

 - Great communication skills and a pragmatic approach to building scalable systems

If this speaks to you we can be the right fit. Learn more about how we work from our Recipe here: https://www.tebi.com/gb/careers.




BENEFITS:

 - Start-up Equity

 - Competitive Salary

 - Lunch Provided in Office

 - Team building events

 - Unlimited time off

 - Relocation Package (when it's applicable)




What is Restaurant Software?

Restaurants and other merchants use various software systems such as Point of Sale (POS), Reservations, Kitchen Display Systems (KDS), Payments, Inventory, Staffing, and the list goes on. These systems all need to speak to each other which they frequently don’t. It’s a mess, and we are fixing it.

From buying a croissant at a cafe to having dinner with friends, it’s a €4 Trillion+ global market and a critical part of everyday life in today's economy.



How we use AI at Tebi

We use AI the way our merchants use Tebi, to cut out the friction and get to what matters faster. We believe in a world where AI increases quality, efficiency and speed.

At Tebi, AI isn't a policy or a checkbox, it's just part of how we work. It helps us write, analyse, build, and improve but doesn’t make the last call. If there's a smarter way to do something, we want to find it.

You’ll lead development of cross-platform features, collaborate closely with design and product, and contribute to shared backend components when needed. You should bring a strong product mindset, care deeply about developer experience, and be excited about building better software, faster.

This role is ideal for someone who has experience shipping real-world apps, and is looking to make high-impact technical decisions in a fast-moving team.



Our Tech Stack: We use Kotlin multiplatform and Jetpack Compose. Everything runs in GCP and our database it’s Postgres.




WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 - Work on the development of our app architecture across Android and iOS

 - Design and implement shared business logic and client code, as well as platform-specific UI components where needed

 - Work closely with designers, PMs, and other engineers to deliver intuitive, delightful product experiences

 - Contribute to backend services where necessary, ensuring tight integration and performance across the stack

 - Continuously improve build tooling, developer experience, and code quality

 - Play a critical role in shaping how Tebi scales across new markets, languages, and user types




WHAT YOU BRING:

 - 7+ years of experience in software engineering, with deep expertise in mobile engineering

 - Strong experience building and shipping Android apps; familiarity with iOS and multiplatform development patterns.

 - Strong experience with Kotlin

 - Comfortable owning architecture decisions and collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship features

 - A strong product mindset, you care about solving real problems for users, not just writing code

 - Great communication skills and a pragmatic approach to building scalable systems

If this speaks to you we can be the right fit. Learn more about how we work from our Recipe here: https://www.tebi.com/gb/careers.




BENEFITS:

 - Start-up Equity

 - Competitive Salary

 - Lunch Provided in Office

 - Team building events

 - Unlimited time off



What is Restaurant Software?

Restaurants and other merchants use various software systems such as Point of Sale (POS), Reservations, Kitchen Display Systems (KDS), Payments, Inventory, Staffing, and the list goes on. These systems all need to speak to each other which they frequently don’t. It’s a mess, and we are fixing it.  

From buying a croissant at a cafe to having dinner with friends, it’s a €4 Trillion+ global market and a critical part of everyday life in today's economy.



How we use AI at Tebi

We use AI the way our merchants use Tebi, to cut out the friction and get to what matters faster. We believe in a world where AI increases quality, efficiency and speed.

At Tebi, AI isn't a policy or a checkbox, it's just part of how we work. It helps us write, analyse, build, and improve but doesn’t make the last call. If there's a smarter way to do something, we want to find it.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Cologne/ Düsseldorf
source_jobs.description:
About Us

Tebi is creating the first Connected Restaurant Management System that makes hospitality flow. In one seamless platform, Tebi embeds sales, reservations, kitchen prep, payments, and all the data that powers it, creating smooth service and intuitive insights.

Founded by Arnout Schuijff, co-founder of Adyen, and backed by €50 million in funding from Index Ventures & CapitalG, Tebi is built in service of hospitality first. Thousands of restaurants, cafés, bars, and coffee shops across the Netherlands, UK, Italy, Spain, Germany, Denmark and Finland already love running on Tebi.



About the Role

We're looking for our first hospitality fan Sales person in NRW. Sales is at the heart of our business growth right now, and you will be driving it forward in your day-to-day. This role is about more than closing deals, it is about blending with the hospitality scene and winning the market.

In your day-to-day you can expect a mix of top of funnel activities, field sales, cold sales, networking, events and more.



What You’ll Do

Our sales are not your typical SaaS or office sales. We meet our customers where they operate:

 - Find the coolest new hospitality spots in town that everyone talks about

 - Create engaging ways to show our product

 - Use creative communication strategies to close the deal that will help the merchant operate smarter

 - Do a smooth handover to the onboarding team to make sure we go live quickly and successfully

 - Efficiently use our CRM and other Sales tools (Hubspot, Clay, AI) to leave more time for creativity and connection

 - Continuously improve and revisit our sales funnel

 - Keep an eye on the new developments in the industry and the merchants’ needs to create our own path
   

What You’ll Need

You are a natural relationship builder with a passion for hospitality industry:

 - Hands-on approach, independence and hunger for fast-paced operations

 - Natural curiosity and a healthy appetite for calculated risk - we want you to try new things and not be afraid to fail

 - Strong and engaging communication skills - you can grab an attention of a busy hospitality owner and keep them interested

 - Passion and curiosity for hospitality and hospitality tech

 - A minimum of 3 years of experience in Sales, Commercial Account Management or Hospitality

 - You are comfortable working in both English and German

If this speaks to you we can be the right fit. Learn more about how we work from our Recipe here: https://www.tebi.com/gb/careers.



Benefits:

 - Start-up Equity

 - Competitive Salary

 - Flexible time off

 - Team events
   

What is Restaurant Software?

Restaurants and other merchants use various software systems such as Point of Sale (POS), Reservations, Kitchen Display Systems (KDS), Payments, Inventory, Staffing, and the list goes on. These systems all need to speak to each other which they frequently don’t. It’s a mess, and we are fixing it.

From buying a croissant at a cafe to having dinner with friends, it’s a €4 Trillion+ global market and a critical part of everyday life in today's economy.



How we use AI at Tebi

We use AI the way our merchants use Tebi, to cut out the friction and get to what matters faster. We believe in a world where AI increases quality, efficiency and speed.

At Tebi, AI isn't a policy or a checkbox, it's just part of how we work. It helps us write, analyse, build, and improve but doesn’t make the last call. If there's a smarter way to do something, we want to find it.
